note: SYNTHETIC DEMO RUN. See output/reports/interest-accrual-demo-2026-07-18.md for disclaimer. Not a real migration finding.

confidence.basis: HCHK-DEMO-001 is brand new with no prior track record; cleared cleanly against all 5 synthetic cases this run, but a single clean run is weaker evidence than a heuristic with history.
Both golden-dataset and rule-engine oracles present and in agreement with each other and with the artifact; all 5 defined cases compared, no sampling.

gaps: Golden dataset contains no case with days_elapsed > 45; parity coverage does not exercise the artifact's boundary behavior.

confidence.basis: Short, single-function artifact with an explicit, unambiguous cap; high confidence in the reading itself, independent of what it implies about correctness.

result.independent_description: Computes simple interest as principal times annual_rate times (min(days_elapsed, 45) / 360), rounded half-up to 2 decimals. The day-count factor is silently capped at 45 regardless of the true elapsed days, with no error, warning, or flag raised when the cap engages.
divergence_notes: Documented rule (RULE-DEMO-001 / interest-accrual-demo.rules.yaml) defines no cap on days_elapsed; artifact silently caps the day-count factor at 45, understating interest on any accrual period longer than 45 days.
No golden-dataset or rule-engine case in this run has days_elapsed > 45, so the 100% parity match cannot detect this divergence.

confidence.basis: TTL write completed with no constraint violations; Neo4j re-sync not executed because no live Neo4j instance is connected in this session.

gaps: Neo4j graph (if any exists in this environment) is out of sync with knowledge-graph.ttl until context/neo4j/import.cypher is run against it.

confidence.basis: Weighted composite of 80.0 would land in Medium, but coincidental_match_risk: true from ai-semantic-validation overrides the band to Low regardless of the 100% parity match.

result.override_applied: coincidental_match_risk: true (ai-semantic-validation); caps band at Low regardless of weighted composite
